---
title: "Benchmarks"
subtitle: "Longitudinal measurements from persisted lab records"
execute:
  enabled: true
  echo: false
---

Every table on this page is rendered from the commit-stamped JSON records in
[`benchmarks/`](https://github.com/QR-Madness/pycryption/tree/master/benchmarks)
— saved deliberately with `task bench:save`, never re-measured at site build.
Payloads are seeded, so numbers are comparable across runs; machine and commit
context travels with every record.

```{python}
from IPython.display import Markdown, display

from lib.notebook import load_runs

runs = load_runs()
if not runs:
    display(Markdown("_No saved runs yet — `task bench:save` creates the first record._"))
```

```{python}
def md(text):
    display(Markdown(text))

if runs:
    latest = runs[-1]
    git = latest["git"]
    machine = latest["machine"]
    commit = (git["commit"] or "?") + ("-dirty" if git["dirty"] else "")
    md(f"""
## Latest Run

| | |
|---|---|
| **Saved** | {latest["saved_at"]} |
| **Commit** | `{commit}` |
| **Machine** | {machine["hostname"]} ({machine["machine"]}, {machine["cpu_count"]} cores) |
| **Python** | {machine["python"]} |
| **Seed** | `{latest["seed"]}` |
| **Iterations** | {latest["iterations"]} |
""")
```

```{python}
if runs:
    import pandas as pd

    rows = []
    for algo, result in runs[-1]["benchmarks"].items():
        for entry in result["benchmarks"]:
            rows.append({
                "Algorithm": algo,
                "Size (B)": f'{entry["size_bytes"]:,}',
                "Encrypt (ms)": entry["avg_encrypt_ms"],
                "Decrypt (ms)": entry["avg_decrypt_ms"],
                "Throughput (MB/s)": entry["throughput_mbps"],
                "P99 Encrypt (ms)": entry.get("p99_encrypt_ms", "-"),
            })
    md("### Results by Size")
    display(pd.DataFrame(rows))
```

```{python}
if runs and "analysis" in runs[-1]:
    rows = []
    for algo, panel in runs[-1]["analysis"].items():
        if "error" in panel:
            continue
        rows.append({
            "Algorithm": algo,
            "Entropy (bits/B)": panel["entropy_bits_per_byte"],
            "χ²": panel["chi2_statistic"],
            "Avalanche %": panel["avalanche_pct"],
            "ECB Dups": panel["ecb_duplicate_blocks"],
            "Verdict": "✅ CLEAN" if not panel["flags"] else "⚠️ " + ", ".join(panel["flags"]),
        })
    if rows:
        md("## Output Quality Panel")
        md("From the same saved run — entropy, byte uniformity, avalanche, and the ECB canary.")
        display(pd.DataFrame(rows))
```

```{python}
if len(runs) >= 2:
    from lib.notebook import compare_runs

    old, new = runs[-2], runs[-1]
    delta_rows = compare_runs(old, new)
    if delta_rows:
        md(f"""
## Trend vs Previous Run

`{old["git"]["commit"]}` ({old["saved_at"]}) → `{new["git"]["commit"]}` ({new["saved_at"]})
""")
        display(pd.DataFrame([{
            "Algorithm": r["algorithm"],
            "Size (B)": f'{r["size_bytes"]:,}',
            "Old (MB/s)": r["old_throughput_mbps"],
            "New (MB/s)": r["new_throughput_mbps"],
            "Δ %": r["delta_pct"],
        } for r in delta_rows]))
```

```{python}
if runs:
    md("## Run History")
    import pandas as pd
    display(pd.DataFrame([{
        "Saved": r["saved_at"],
        "Commit": (r["git"]["commit"] or "?") + ("-dirty" if r["git"]["dirty"] else ""),
        "Host": r["machine"]["hostname"],
        "Label": r.get("label") or "—",
        "Algorithms": len(r.get("benchmarks", {})),
    } for r in runs]))
```
